channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Italian prosecutors confirm journalist was hacked with Paragon spyware
item.description: Italian authorities are making progress in their investigation into a wide-ranging spyware scandal in Italy involving Paragon spyware. But the mystery...

item.title: BYD rolls out EV batteries with 5-minute âflash charging.â But thereâs a catch.
item.description: The Chinese automaker's new Blade Battery 2.0 is capable of charging at up to 1.5 megawatts, dramatically slashing the time it takes to fill up.

item.title: Amazon is rolling out a redesigned Fire TV app
item.description: With the updated Fire TV app, users can browse and discover content directly from their phone, manage their watchlist on the go, and play titles on th...

item.title: Meta will allow rival AI chatbots on WhatsApp in Europe, but for a fee
item.description: Meta will allow rival AI chatbot providers to offer their services on WhatsApp for a fee, which ranges from â¬0.0490 to â¬0.1323 per "non-template messa...

item.title: Best Gravel Running Shoes (2026): Salomon, Adidas, Nike
item.description: The best new shoes in this hybrid, niche footwear style can take you from your front door, down the asphalt, and into the trees.

item.title: Itâs official: The Pentagon has labeled Anthropic a supply-chain risk
item.description: The Department of Defense has officially labeled Anthropic a supply-chain risk, making the AI firm the first American company with the label. Meanwhil...

item.title: Zeno raises $25M to speed up production of its battery-swap motorbikes
item.description: The startup, co-founded by Tesla and Apple alumni, has sold nearly 1,000 of its motorbikes so far.

item.title: X revamps Creator Subscriptions with new features, like exclusive threads and shareable cards
item.description: X is rolling out a series of new features for creators, like the ability to offer paid threads and other marketing tools.

item.title: Science Corp raises $230M as it races to bring its brain implant to market
item.description: A source close to the company says the round assigns Science a post-money valuation of $1.25 billion.

item.title: How 1,000+ customer calls shaped a breakout enterprise AI startup
item.description: On this episode of Build Mode, David Park joins Isabelle Johannessen to discuss how he and his team are intentionally iterating, fundraising, and scal...
